title: Does monday.com do CRM? You bet! Webinar this Wednesday 13 Sept at 1:00pm AEST

posts.author: Ania (Ania Bokina APJ Marketing at monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
This webinar will deep dive into how-to’s for improved productivity, cost-efficiency, reduced admin time, and relationship building.

Check out what the agenda will look like:

Challenges in delivering world-class customer and employee experience.
Uncover hurdles holding back businesses from delivering key initiatives.
Demonstrate how a flexible relationship management solution can enable speed and agility to market, no matter the industry or use case.
Lessons from customers and how they’ve achieved agility to market

Sign up to secure your spot https://monday.zoom.us/webinar/register/8916922430555/WN_8RPJwhjdSg6uU_TazbVE_A

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a replay available to watch?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
There sure is

Check out the session here → Webinar: Achieving agility with an adaptable CRM
